2982136.title: De avonturen van Kid Danger
2982136.description: Captain Man must save Kid Danger from Drillfinger with the only tool he has: a motorized toilet. // Prepping for cheer tryouts, Piper tries out Captain Man's now-discontinued health program but when she turns into a beast the heroes must stop her.

2991211.title: De avonturen van Kid Danger
2991211.description: After misplacing the shrink ray Captain Man and Kid Danger have to battle The Toddler to win it back. // When Captain Man & Kid Danger find a golden pickle in their burger they win a private tour of the secretive factory where Beefo's Burgers are made.

3019675.title: De avonturen van Kid Danger
3019675.description: Feeling that being Captain Man is too much work for just one person, Ray and Schwoz hatch the perfect plan: clone Ray.

3041311.title: De avonturen van Kid Danger
3041311.description: Captain Man & Kid Danger race against the clock to stop Daddy Longlegs from unleashing his army of spiders on Swellview.

3012224.title: De avonturen van Kid Danger
3012224.description: Captain Man & Kid Danger are tasked with driving to pick up 1,000 hot dogs for a birthday party.

3021372.title: De avonturen van Kid Danger
3021372.description: To save Schwoz from an experiment gone wrong, Captain Man & Kid Danger must follow instructions he posted online, but first they need decent wifi.

3038554.title: De avonturen van Kid Danger
3038554.description: While trying to create two identical pieces of popcorn Ray and Henry accidentally brings to life the Popcorn Monster. // To help Ray win the Swellview Drone Dash against Dr. Minyak, Schwoz hatches a plan: shrink Kid Danger & have him pilot his own drone.

3039957.title: De avonturen van Kid Danger
3039957.description: When the Wahoo Punch Bro is running amok through Swellview, Captain Man & Kid Danger must find a way to stop him. // When Mitch Bilsky mocks Henry's kiddie motor scooter, Ray sets up race between Henry & Mitch to prove whose transportation is faster.

2998739.title: De avonturen van Kid Danger
2998739.description: Captain Man & Kid Danger are tasked with driving to pick up 1,000 hot dogs for a birthday party. // To save Schwoz from an experiment gone wrong, Captain Man & Kid Danger must follow instructions he posted online, but first they need decent wifi.

3000447.title: De avonturen van Kid Danger
3000447.description: Jasper becomes trapped in a dream using one of Schwoz's Snooze Pods. It's up to Captain Man & Kid Danger to bring him back. // Henry's field trip to the Museum of Celebrity Garbage is cut short by the arrival of Sticky Vicky.

3019185.title: De avonturen van Kid Danger
3019185.description: The group's vacation is cut short when Jasper falls into a volcano & is held captive by the Volcaniacs.

3040805.title: De avonturen van Kid Danger
3040805.description: Captain Man and Kid Danger use Schowz' Fish-Talker helmet to help a lost fish find his way home.

3059202.title: De avonturen van Kid Danger
3059202.description: While stuck in a restaurant bathroom, Ray, Henry, Charlotte, Jasper, and Schwoz reminisce about past adventures.

3079311.title: De avonturen van Kid Danger
3079311.description: Captain Man must save Kid Danger from Drillfinger with the only tool he has: a motorized toilet.
